parent_a: As an operations research expert, first develop a correct mathematical formulation. Then, provide the complete, executable Python code for the Gurobi optimizer. parent_b: As an operations research expert, first construct a precise mathematical model. Then, output only complete, executable Python Gurobi code within a fenced python block.
